query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_posts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN featuredImageUrl IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_images,
  SUM(CASE WHEN featuredImageUrl LIKE '/blog/%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as local_images,
  SUM(CASE WHEN featuredImageUrl LIKE 'https://%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as external_images
FROM blog_posts;
